Authenticated /user endpoint returns the current user's profile
Issue can be created in a freshly seeded repository

2942-MainThread
Repository web URL is built from the public base URL, owner, and repo name
Slugs strip special characters and normalize to lowercase-hyphenated text
Repository creation payload includes all supplied fields
Issue creation payload includes all supplied fields
Auth headers use Gitea's 'token' authorization scheme
Trailing slashes are trimmed from a base URL
Unique names are deterministic when explicit entropy is supplied
API base URL defaults to <base_url>/api/v1 when not overridden
